rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 28, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT LAUREN FRIEDLY, M.D. Demurrer To Fifth Cause Of Action In Plaintiff's 2nd Amended Complaint. Defendant's demurrer to the 5th cause of action (N.I.E.D.) is sustained without leave to amend. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF FRANKLIN GOLDBERG AND JUNA GOLDBERG VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 28, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT ANNA SZARY M.D., RUEDI THOENI, M.D., ESTHER CHEN, M.D., MARGARET SALMON, M.D., THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, BORY KEA, M.D. MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (negligence) is sustained without leave to amend. If plaintiff, during discovery, determines facts that would support a cause of action for negligent hiring, it can seek leave to amend the complaint. Defendants' demurrer to the 4th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Defendants' motion to strike post death damages is granted without leave to amend. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF FRANKLIN GOLDBERG AND JUNA GOLDBERG VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 28, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT ANNA SZARY M.D., RUEDI THOENI, M.D., ESTHER CHEN, M.D., MARGARET SALMON, M.D., SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL, THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, BORY KEA, M.D. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (negligence) is sustained without leave to amend. If plaintiff, during discovery, determines facts that would support a cause of action for negligent hiring, it can seek leave to amend the complaint. Defendants' demurrer to the 4th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Defendants' motion to strike post death damages is granted without leave to amend. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF FRANKLIN GOLDBERG AND JUNA GOLDBERG VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 28, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT JONATHAN LEICHTLING, M.D. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's demurrer to the 5th cause of action (N.I.E.D.) is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant's motion to strike the damage claims for the 4th and 5th causes of action (wrongful death and N.I.E.D.) is granted. Emotional distress damages are not recoverable in a wrongful death action and the N.I.E.D. claim has been dismissed under the demurrer. =(302/LMG)
